title: Chenchu Lakshmi
actors: Akkineni Nageshwara Rao, Anjali Devi, S.V. Ranga Rao
plot: Vishnu's wife Mahalakshmi's parents are reborn as tribal people in a tribe called Chenchu as they are cursed by a sage. There they give birth to a beautiful girl named Chenchitha. Vishu after killing Hiranyakasipu wanders in that ...
